# Refactor PR Template

## Description

<!-- What was restructured and why? No behavior changes unless explicitly noted. -->

## Related Issues/Milestones

- Relates to #<issue_number> (optional)
- Milestone: <milestone_name_or_link> (optional)

## Changes

<!-- High-level bullet list of structural changes. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this refactor needed? What does it improve? -->

## Testing

- [ ] Existing tests pass unchanged
- [ ] No behavior changes introduced (or noted below if any)
- [ ] Smoke check(s):
  - [ ] App builds
  - [ ] Basic flows unaffected

## Risk

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Notes: <anything notable about blast radius or unintended side effects>

## Checklist

- [ ] Lint/format pass
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] No user-facing behavior changes (unless stated above)
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
